Offline Scenario Explorer

This prototype is meant to show the jury how a planner at Iberdrola could compare a few rollout assumptions locally, without installing anything or depending on an internet connection.

Proposed stations
-
Friction points
-
Projected EVs 2027
-
Baseline stations
-

Why this matters

The point is not to show a huge web platform. The point is to let the jury test a few planning assumptions and immediately see how the network changes. This keeps the artifact simple and still gives Iberdrola something interactive.

The current grid-status logic is still based on the provisional assumptions already declared in the repository. This explorer is intended as a decision-support prototype, not as a replacement for real node-level grid matching.
